name: Icon Cloud
description: A 3D rotating cloud of icons/logos rendered in a sphere formation, similar to a tag cloud but with smooth WebGL-powered rotation.
whenToUse: Use for technology stack showcases, partner logos, skill displays, or any collection of icons that benefits from a 3D cloud visualization.

props.name: iconSlugs
props.description: Array of Simple Icons slugs to display in the cloud

props.name: images
props.description: Array of image URLs to use as icons
